title: Adding Restriction Permission to Files Column
excerpt: I wish that the Files column could be set as a restricted column so that only those granted permission can view or edit it.  It’s not practical to create the Link column and have to upload documents to my Google drive an…

posts.author: Trisha (Trisha Emery)
posts.cookedHtml: I wish that the Files column could be set as a restricted column so that only those granted permission can view or edit it. It’s not practical to create the Link column and have to upload documents to my Google drive and link them to the board.
